refnamediv.refpurpose: Executes SQL statements in a batch

refentry.refsect1:
&reftitle.parameters;
conn_identifier
The CUBRID connection. If not specified, the last connection opened by cubrid_connect is assumed.
sql_stmt
An array holding the SQL statements to execute, one string per element.

&reftitle.returnvalues;
Returns an array with one element per executed statement, or &false; on failure. Each element is itself an array of two values: the result code at index 0 and the error message at index 1 (an empty string when the statement succeeded).
